title: 2026 Tristate Installer — underlay switch, WRDT1, permanent
motto: Move under without damage. Arrive → Transform → Commit. From commit forward we are always the underlay — no off switch.

policy.hotkey_note: F9 normally unused on Linux desktop — F11 Queen fullscreen, F8 RTX fullscreen, F1 help, F5 refresh

flow: Drive Converter — scan all field storage (dry-run)
Drive Converter — in-place World redump (WRDT1/WRZC1, non-destructive)
Prepare Grok boot — next reboot into KILROY Field
Reboot — guest OS runs inside field die protections

drive_converter.name: World_Redata Drive Converter
drive_converter.restore_doctrine: Re-field shadow first — then WRZC/WRDT/ZAC come back out with zero loss; simple issues OK until reboot
